title: August 10
content:
<noinclude>{{Top|real|nocat=1}}
{{Month|August}}
'''August 10''' is the 222nd day of the year (223rd in leap years). There are 143 days remaining.</noinclude>

*[[1920s#1929|1929]] – [[Peter Diamond]] is born.
*[[1930s#1932|1932]] – [[LEGO|The LEGO Group]] is founded.
*[[1930s#1938|1938]] – [[Bronco McLoughlin]] is born.
*[[1960s#1966|1966]] – [[André Sogliuzzo]] is born.
*[[1971]] – [[Justin Theroux]] is born.
*[[1977]] – [[Star Wars (1977) 5|''Star Wars'' (1977) 5]] published. The cover date is November.
*[[1983]] – [[Bonnie Maree Piesse]] is born.
*1983 – [[Return of the Jedi Weekly 8|''Return of the Jedi Weekly'' 8]] published.
*[[1985]] – [[Return of the Jedi Weekly 112|''Return of the Jedi Weekly'' 112]] published.
*[[2005]] – [[General Grievous 4|''General Grievous'' 4]] published.
*2005 – [[Empire 34|''Empire'' 34]] published.
*[[2008]] – [[Star Wars: The Clone Wars (film)|''Star Wars: The Clone Wars'' film]] has its Hollywood red carpet premiere.
*[[2011]] – [[Invasion: Revelations 2|''Invasion: Revelations'' 2]] published.
*2011 – [[The Old Republic—The Lost Suns 3|''The Old Republic—The Lost Suns'' 3]] published.
*[[2016]] – [[Darth Vader (2015) 24|''Darth Vader'' (2015) 24]] published.
*2016 – [[Star Wars Rebels Magazine 20|''Star Wars Rebels'' Magazine 20]] published in the United Kingdom.
*[[2017]] – "[[A Perilous Rescue]]" premieres on [[Disney XD]].
*[[2021]] – ''[[Guardians of the Whills: The Manga]]'' published.
*2021 – ''[[Star Wars: Doctor Aphra Vol. 2 — The Engine Job]]'' published.
*2021 – [[Star Wars Insider 204|''Star Wars Insider'' 204]] published.
*[[2022]] – [[Bounty Hunters 26|''Bounty Hunters'' 26]] published.
*2022 – [[Han Solo & Chewbacca 5|''Han Solo & Chewbacca'' 5]] published.
<noinclude>
